title: MyGift Small Clear Glass Reed Diffuser Bottles, Vintage Embossed Apothecary Style Flower Bud Vases with Cork Lids, Set of 2
description:
About this item
Set of 2 diamond-faceted clear glass bottles with removable cork lid
Great for essential oils, reeds or small flowers
Compact size allows for easy display on any shelf, tabletop, or vanity
Vintage aesthetic complements a variety of decors at home, weddings or events
Approximate Dimensions: 3.9 H × 2.4 Diameter (in inches)
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Was really looking for something that would fit in my master bathroom and guest bathroom. Very sturdy and really fit nicely to go with just about any bathroom decor. Would recommend to anyoneCame super well packaged. Very cute.These are so incredibly charming and provide interest, detail and texture. LovelyBeautiful, great quality, i just wish it comes with the sticks.I purchased these because the oil diffuser I purchased came in an unsteady and ugly plastic bottle. These two crystal diffuser bottles are gorgeous. They catch the light and work perfectly for the oil and reeds.These look great on my vanity, I keep hydrogen peroxide in one and rubbing alcohol in the other.Beautifully cut and sturdy. Perfect for a homemade diffuserI used for fragrance with reedsVery happy with this item, its exactly how described. Very prettyGood diffuser bottle with a vintage look.
